node.text: She surprised me with her answers 😱 #waleedazam_ #fyp #desi #urdu #usa
Petrol hain kia jo expensive hain😂😂😂😂😂
Ap black kiun ho Yar ap pagal ho 🌝
Jesi ap hein apko dekh k har “”””cost””” hi gun chalaye ge Lollllll🤣
